memoryArtifacts.headline: Mr. Godbold
memoryArtifacts.description:
Though examined records reveal not the given name of the Godbold ancestor who was born about 1450 and lived in Suffolk, England, the wills of three of his sons provide information about him.

Accordin …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Godbold於1450年出生在英國素福爾可丹寧頓時，他的父親William Godbold26歲，母親Elizabeth Rasted25歲。他和Margery Storye至少有5個兒子和2個女兒。他埋葬在英國素福爾可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Godbold于1450年出生在英国素福爾可丹寧頓时，他的父亲William Godbold26岁，母亲Elizabeth Rasted25岁。他和Margery Storye至少有5个儿子和2个女儿。他埋葬在英国素福爾可。

nameMeanings.name: Godbold
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Suffolk): from the Middle English and Old French personal name Godebald, Godbaud, a medieval French form of the ancient Germanic name Godebald, composed of the elements gōd ‘good’ or god ‘god’ + bald ‘bold, brave’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Godbold was born in 1450, in Dennington, Suffolk, England, his father, William Godbold, was 26 and his mother, Elizabeth Rasted, was 25. He had at least 5 sons and 2 daughters with Margery Storye. He was buried in Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Godbold est né en 1450, à Dennington, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, William Godbold, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Rasted, avait 25 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles avec Margery Storye. Ilenterré à Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Godbold 1450 in Dennington, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Godbold 26 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Rasted 25. Er hatte mit Margery Storye mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er wurde in Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Godbold è nato il nel 1450 nel Dennington, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, William Godbold, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Rasted, aveva 25 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie con Margery Storye. Fu sepolto a Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Godboldが1450年にイギリススフォルクデニントンで生まれた時，父William Godboldは26歳，母Elizabeth Rastedは25歳であった。彼はMargery Storyeとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼はイギリススフォルクにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Godbold(이)가 1450년 영국 수폴크 데닝턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Godbold(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Rasted(은)는 25세였다. 그는 Margery Storye(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 영국 수폴크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Godbold nasceu em 1450, em Dennington, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Godbold, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Rasted, tinha 25 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas com Margery Storye. Ele foi sepultado em Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Godbold родился в 1450 г. в местности деннингтон, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени William Godbold было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Rasted, 25. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери от Margery Storye. Он был похоронен в местности суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Godbold nació en 1450, en Dennington, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, William Godbold, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Rasted, tenía 25 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas con Margery Storye. Fue sepultado en Suffolk, Inglaterra.
